{{Infobox concept
| name = Diamondscale Sea Drakes
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Diamondscale Sea Drakes]] were once kept in captivity by refiners but broke free decades ago and have been breeding in the wild.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Diamondscale [[Sea Drake]] has saber-sharp teeth and a light in its throat like a blue furnace.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Diamondscale [[Sea Drake]] has mastery of [[water aura]] allowing it to swim through air.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] and [[Ziel]] eat the corpse of the Diamondscale [[Sea Drake]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
